title: LinkedIn Integration Help needed
excerpt: I have been able to successfully setup my LinkedIn integration to post messages on a schedule or when a status changes. I have been able to post photos along with my posts but each photo includes a link at the bottom wit…

posts.author: JoseCarrero (Jose Carrero)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have been able to successfully setup my LinkedIn integration to post messages on a schedule or when a status changes. I have been able to post photos along with my posts but each photo includes a link at the bottom with a hyperlink.
Has someone been able to posts photos without hyperlinks showing at the bottom of the photo?

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
I can certainly help you in this case via thrid party integration tool.

Let me know if you’re interested. You can reach out to me at aquibcs@outlook.com

posts.author: JoseCarrero (Jose Carrero)
posts.cookedHtml: I would prefer not to add another integration to this mix.

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml: Its your choice but downloading the attachment from monday file links is the only option to send the actual file to another application.
